hypothesis: Correction propagation at N=813: <10 falsified, FP<10%, 0 HIGH, correction rate >50%
method: Ran correction_propagation.py (v2-directional) at N=814. Classified all 25 uncorrected citations via semantic analysis (3 parallel agents). Fixed 6 content-dependent citations. Reran tool to verify.
key_finding: Semantic classification reveals 14/20 remaining uncorrected citations are SAFE contextual references. Tool overcounts by ~70%.
